MediaModeratorDTO.description:
Sensitive/staff fields.
Show them only if viewer can actually act as staff for media.

IMPORTANT: "read explicit" is NOT a moderation entitlement by itself,
so it must NOT unlock mod fields.

post.description:
POST /media/:id/tags
needs perms in principal (service checks):
- MEDIA_TAGS_EDIT_ANY OR (MEDIA_TAGS_EDIT_OWN + owner)

get.description:
GET /search
public, permission-aware via principal (optional cookie auth)

post.description:
POST /media/upload
auth required + perms + ban + restriction checks

get.description:
GET /media/:id/comments
Скрываем эндпоинт через permission (если нет perms -> 401/403 на auth этапе)

delete.description:
DELETE /comments/:id
any-of (own or any) -> поэтому только LOAD_PERMISSIONS, а дальше доменная проверка.

post.description:
POST /comics
auth required + not banned + permissions loaded
